home.subtitle: Turn every congress photo into verified academic knowledge.
home.welcomeTitle: Your first congress, organized in minutes.
home.welcomeDesc: Create a congress, upload the slide photos, and let the AI extract the OCR, detect topics and verify the bibliography against CrossRef and PubMed.
home.step1Desc: Name, specialty and dates. Takes 30 seconds.
home.step2Desc: Up to 100 slides. Automatic compression and orientation.
home.step3Desc: OCR + topics + verified bibliography in a few minutes.
home.quality3: Multi-AI: Claude Sonnet + Gemini Flash + GPT-4o
home.quality4: Respects your privacy: no patient data

congressList.title: My congresses
congressList.emptyDesc: Create your first congress and start uploading your academic photos.

congressDetail.summaryDesc: Builds a consolidated view by topics and findings.
congressDetail.exportDesc: Generate deliverables when the flow is available.
congressDetail.findingsDesc: Explore the content organized by clinical topics

ai.topicsExtracted: {n, plural, =0 {No topics extracted} =1 {1 topic extracted} other {# topics extracted}}

landing.heroSubtitle: Transform your visual captures into technical reports and verified bibliography instantly. No noise, just science.
landing.feature1Desc: Get the technical synthesis of each talk, organized by topic and ready for clinical sessions.
landing.feature2Desc: Access official abstracts and verify the scientific impact of the citations detected in the slides.
landing.feature3Desc: We filter out the visual noise to deliver only information validated to the highest academic standards.
